title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They have tried resetting their password multiple times but still cannot access the dashboard.

title: Payment Failed - Card Declined
description: Customer attempted to complete payment using Visa ending in 1234 but the transaction fails despite sufficient balance.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download the January invoice from the billing section. The download button appears inactive.

title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Customer’s billing address shows an outdated city even after updating profile details.

title: App Crash on Launch
description: Customer reports that the mobile application crashes immediately after opening on Android 13.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer requested a refund two weeks ago but has not yet received the credited amount.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
description: Customer is not receiving 2FA codes on their registered mobile number during login attempts.

title: Unable to Update Profile Picture
description: Customer receives an 'Upload failed' error while trying to update their profile image.

title: Subscription Auto-Renewal Disabled
description: Customer wants to enable auto-renewal for their subscription but the toggle switch remains disabled.

title: Missing Order Confirmation Email
description: Customer placed an order successfully but did not receive a confirmation email.

title: Password Reset Link Expired
description: Customer reports that the password reset link expires immediately after clicking.

title: Delay in Order Shipment
description: Customer has not received shipment tracking details five days after order confirmation.
